# function: truncate

Return the integer value of an input parameter.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Return the truncation of 1.2345:
provider::stdlib::truncate(1.2345)
# result => 1

# Return the truncation of -67.89:
provider::stdlib::truncate(-67.89)
# result => -67
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
truncate(number number) number
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `number` (Number) Input number parameter for determining the truncated integer value.
